attributes.action: Sort out the uk roads ! Or we stop paying road tax !
attributes.additional_details: Because we all pay road tax and the roads are getting worse ! You make us get an MOT to ensure our cars are ok for the roads .. yet the roads aren't good enough for our cars
attributes.background: Sort out 90% of the uk roads as the potholes are beyond ridiculous !

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fix Our Roads: National Plan on Dangerous Potholes Now
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/739014
